dependencies.rationale: Shared clamping and stable summation govern domain scoring.
Money rounding and exact-decimal aggregation boundary rules govern compute.
Forecast point and Monte Carlo outputs use round_money and deterministic seed handling.
round_score and clamp01 normalize risk.
Exact-decimal delta handling and minimum floors rely on normalization helpers.
safe_unit and stable ordering control graph-path quality.
clamp100, round_score, and safe_unit normalize trust synthesis.
half_life_score, sigmoid, and min_non_null are reused by work routing.
Client-flow reliability reuses shared helpers plus additional UX-specific helpers.
Forecast consumes compute baseline totals and run-rate context.
Parity comparison basis starts from frozen compute outputs.
ComputeResult is a required TrustSummary input artifact.
Trust uses risk_score and unresolved risk flags.
Trust uses parity_score and comparison requirement posture.
Trust uses graph_quality_score and retention penalty posture.
Trust uses data_quality_score and completeness_score.
Authority uncertainty contributes to basis ceilings.
Basis ceilings cap automation and filing readiness before score math.
Upstream gates cap legal progression even when the numeric score is green.
Trust posture generates dominant and constrained reason-code packets.
Reason codes and explainability are persisted on TrustSummary.
Trust reuse depends on the persisted trust basis and score/cap posture remaining current.
Supersession and append-only lineage update the TrustSummary lifecycle boundary.
Parity gate posture contributes to the frozen upstream cap before trust gating.
Data-quality gate posture can force review or block before trust.
Retention evidence gate posture contributes to upstream legal ceilings.
The summary section compresses the full trust package into one scope statement.

determinism_rules: Formula execution must emit schema-valid TrustSummary, ComputeResult, ForecastSet, RiskReport, and ParityResult artifacts.
Artifact binding is normative current behavior, not a deferred pack repair.
formula_symbols: trust_input_basis_contract{contract_version, basis_contract_hash, input_presence_state, manifest_binding_state, lifecycle_binding_state, consistency_state, limitation_semantics_state, freshness_state, freshness_dependency_classes[], authority_progression_state, baseline_progression_state, baseline_selection_contract_hash_or_null, baseline_automation_ceiling, baseline_limitation_reason_codes[], late_data_invalidation_state, override_dependency_state, human_step_state, trust_input_state, automation_ceiling, filing_readiness_ceiling, input_reason_codes[], blocking_dependency_refs[], trust_fresh_until}

trust_sensitivity_analysis_contract{contract_version, sensitivity_contract_hash, trust_input_basis_contract_hash, execution_mode_boundary_hash, score_cap_alignment_state, cap_driver_reason_codes[], edge_trigger_codes[], trust_green_margin, trust_amber_margin, risk_automation_margin, completeness_margin, graph_filing_margin_or_null, authority_review_margin_or_null, authority_block_margin_or_null, projected_case_results[]}
formula_records.label: TrustSummary Artifact Binding
formula_records.mode_applicability: Both COMPLIANCE and ANALYSIS; artifact flags must remain internally consistent.
money_profile_requirements: TrustSummary must carry dereferenceable compute/parity artifacts whose money-bearing fields preserve the frozen money profile.
notes: This record is a contract surface, not an arithmetic equation family.
It freezes the schema-backed output boundary for all later formula families.

determinism_rules: Weighted averages normalize only by positive active-weight sums.
Non-monetary multi-term reductions use deterministic canonical ordering plus pairwise or compensated summation.
All deterministic branches must be byte-stable under the same manifest.
formula_symbols: money_profile{ currency_code, scale, rounding_mode, aggregation_boundary, serialization_profile }
formula_records.label: Standard Normalization Rules
formula_records.mode_applicability: Shared across all formula families; applies identically under compliance, analysis, workflow, and client-flow evaluation.
money_profile_requirements: Use exact fixed-scale decimal arithmetic in the smallest legal currency unit.
Round only at declared aggregation boundaries.
Serialize money as canonical decimal strings with frozen scale and trailing zeros.
Reject binary floating point, exponent notation, locale separators, NaN, infinity, and trimmed scale.
notes: Shared helper layer for all downstream formula records.

determinism_rules: NOT_REQUESTED and NOT_APPLICABLE facts stay out of the denominator; LIMITED and NOT_YET_MATERIALIZED facts remain in scope and degrade the score.
Zero-sum domain weights, invalid error budgets, and filing-critical silent limitation ambiguity are structural failures, not soft warnings.
formula_records.label: Data-Quality and Completeness
formula_records.mode_applicability: Feeds trust in both modes; projection-side confidence remains read-side only and must never re-enter compute, parity, trust, or filing readiness.
notes: Decision confidence and projection confidence are deliberately separated to preserve legal decisioning boundaries.

determinism_rules: Quarterly totals remain record-layer only even under cumulative basis.
Compliance compute must derive adjustment inclusion from executable reporting scope and exact partition scope, never from requested scope or amendment posture.
RuleEvaluation uses only frozen manifest inputs and executes in deterministic order.
formula_records.label: Record-Layer and Adjustment-Layer Compute
formula_records.mode_applicability: Compliance compute requires CANONICAL facts and executable reporting scope; analysis mode may include PROVISIONAL facts only under explicit frozen analysis policy and must remain analysis_only.
money_profile_requirements: Contribution order within each slice is lexicographic by effective_date and canonical_fact_id.
Exact-decimal intermediate precision is preserved until the declared aggregation boundary, then round_money applies once.
notes: Amendment intent and amendment submit remain year-end reporting basis rather than a new reporting-scope token.

determinism_rules: The point forecast uses mass-preserving seasonality and horizon-scaled trend.
Monte Carlo residuals must be deterministically seeded from frozen controls; manifest_id alone must not perturb the seed.
formula_records.label: Forecast
formula_records.mode_applicability: Analysis-only; forecast artifacts must never mutate the compliance compute result in place.
money_profile_requirements: Forecast outputs round via round_money under the frozen forecast money profile.
notes: No forecast should be emitted for categories with zero baseline steps.

determinism_rules: The model is feature-calibrated and profile-driven rather than heuristic.
Zero-sum risk profiles fail closed with maximal risk and a blocking flag.
formula_records.label: Risk Scoring
formula_records.mode_applicability: Used in both modes from frozen pre-parity artifacts.
notes: Trust consumes both risk_score and the unresolved blocking flags rather than score alone.

determinism_rules: K is deduplicated by field_code and ordered by criticality rank then field_code.
Invalid comparison-set construction must persist a fail-closed ParityResult rather than guessing through partial materialization.
formula_records.label: Parity Comparison-Set Construction
formula_records.mode_applicability: Compliance parity requires canonical authority-comparable facts; analysis parity may include provisional facts only under explicit frozen analysis policy and must remain analysis_only.
money_profile_requirements: Comparison items preserve exact-decimal internal and authority values under the frozen money profile.
notes: Authority calculation path must be frozen before parity evaluation and reused by later filing or amendment stages.

determinism_rules: Each fieldDelta persists threshold and floor inputs needed for exact replay.
Zero-threshold breaches use the profile-defined blocking_ratio_cap rather than implicit infinity semantics.
formula_records.label: Per-Field Parity
formula_records.mode_applicability: Applies to every frozen comparison item; numeric invalidity must stop at the per-field layer and never leak as renderer-local coercion.
money_profile_requirements: Money-bearing deltas are exact-decimal values computed from unrounded intermediates.
Threshold and floor checks use exact intermediates rather than previously rounded display totals.
notes: Per-field classification is a deterministic threshold surface, not a UI-only explanation layer.

determinism_rules: The aggregate classification uses a strict precedence ladder; later score branches cannot override a prior match.
Top-level explanation codes are persisted in deterministic priority order.
formula_records.label: Aggregate Parity
formula_records.mode_applicability: Feeds parity gating and trust synthesis in both modes.
notes: The NOT_REQUIRED fallback applies only when the policy explicitly marks the scope as not requiring authority comparison.

determinism_rules: Best admissible path selection is deterministic through path_tuple ordering.
Fail-closed caps are explicit and severity-ordered; silent ambiguity blocks filing-capable trust regardless of rendered narrative quality.
formula_records.label: Evidence-Graph Quality
formula_records.mode_applicability: Feeds retention evidence gating and trust in filing-capable and review-capable runs.
notes: Projection-side reviewer fidelity is scored explicitly without mutating canonical support semantics.

determinism_rules: Authority uncertainty is quantitative and source-weighted; it may not be replaced by a prose-only heuristic.
The same frozen observation set must reproduce the same uncertainty score and emitted reasons.
formula_records.label: Trust Authority Uncertainty
formula_records.mode_applicability: Always required when trust synthesis evaluates live authority progression or baseline submission posture.
notes: Authority-defined legal truth outranks UI-defined confidence.

determinism_rules: Missing, superseded, manifest-mismatched, inconsistent, or silently limited inputs fail closed with explicit reason codes.
The trust_input_basis_contract freezes typed basis states and ceilings so downstream consumers cannot flatten them into a generic score.
formula_records.label: Trust Input Admissibility and Basis
formula_records.mode_applicability: Required before any trust score or band math; applies in both modes and across continuation/replay lineage admitted by policy.
notes: Every non-dominant basis reason must survive into decision_constraint_codes so later surfaces do not lose the ceiling rationale.

determinism_rules: Trust cannot outrank earlier non-access gates.
The progression order AUTO_ELIGIBLE > NOTICE_ONLY > REVIEW_ONLY > BLOCKED is frozen and persisted.
formula_records.label: Trust Upstream Gate Cap
formula_records.mode_applicability: Applies whenever trust reads prior non-access gate posture.
notes: Upstream gate posture is a stage-local legal ceiling, not a UI convenience.

determinism_rules: Trust is conjunctive and uses a weighted geometric mean over normalized axes.
score_band, cap_band, and trust_band are distinct persisted fields; cap-band restrictions may be stricter than the numeric score.
The trust sensitivity contract freezes the score-vs-cap relation, edge triggers, margins, and exactly six perturbation probes.
The bridge ALLOWED <-> READY_TO_SUBMIT, LIMITED <-> READY_REVIEW, BLOCKED <-> NOT_READY is exact and stage-monotone.
formula_records.label: Trust Scoring, Bands, and Readiness
formula_records.mode_applicability: Core trust family for both modes; ANALYSIS mode is explicitly capped and must never publish greener machine progression than READY_REVIEW/LIMITED.
notes: Sensitivity analysis is a first-class persisted contract rather than debug-only output.
subsection_titles: Score bands, threshold guard bands, and band caps

determinism_rules: Ordering is frozen per snapshot and must not vary with websocket arrival order or local sort heuristics.
Assignment and queue health reuse the same deterministic helper surface as core formulas without feeding filing trust.
formula_records.label: Collaboration Orchestration, Queue, and Routing
formula_records.mode_applicability: Operational secondary family; must remain separate from core filing trust even though it reuses shared helpers.
notes: Secondary operational formula family; do not fold into TrustSummary trust_score semantics.
formula_records.section_title: Collaboration orchestration, queue, and routing formulas

determinism_rules: A trust artifact becomes non-current whenever any listed dependency changes after synthesized_at.
Continuation, rerun, amendment, and replay create new trust artifacts; trust history is append-only lineage.
formula_records.label: Trust Currency and Recalculation
formula_records.mode_applicability: Applies after synthesis on any filing-capable reuse path, rerun, continuation, replay, or amendment lineage.
notes: Currency evaluation is fail-closed and lineage-sensitive rather than timestamp-only freshness checking.

determinism_rules: These metrics are materialized onto governed client artifacts rather than recomputed ad hoc in renderers.
Successful client continuity actions must not decrease flow_stability_score absent exogenous state changes.
formula_symbols: clamp01(I(step_up_verified_at is not null) * I(step_up_expires_at is not null) * I(remaining_seconds(step_up_expires_at)
formula_records.label: Client-Flow Reliability and Completion
formula_records.mode_applicability: Secondary client and portal reliability family; normative for governed UX artifacts but must remain distinct from filing trust.
notes: Secondary governed-client formula family; its outputs should not be mistaken for filing trust or gate semantics.
formula_records.section_title: Client-flow stability, upload-confidence, recovery, approval-readiness, and completion formulas

determinism_rules: TrustSummary.reason_codes preserves the terminal band code together with every applicable penalty or cap code.
dominant_reason_code is the first reason in the frozen trust priority order corresponding to the decisive cap or blocker.
decision_explainability_contract reuses the same ordered reason basis without local recomputation.
formula_records.label: Formula Reason-Code Emission
formula_records.mode_applicability: Applies whenever formula outcomes materially affect trust posture, automation, or filing readiness.
notes: Reason-code emission is normative semantics, not a renderer-local narration layer.

determinism_rules: This section is a prose summary anchor for the full formula layer and keeps the implementation package tied to the source’s one-sentence scope claim.
formula_records.label: Formula Layer Summary
notes: Summary-only numbered section included to keep numbered-section coverage exact.
